name: Firecrawl
description: Web scraping, search, crawling, and page interaction via the Firecrawl CLI. Covers real-time web search with full page content extraction, single-page scraping, multi-page crawls, site mapping, file downloads, and browser interaction. Use when the user wants to search the web, scrape a URL, extract data from a website, or interact with pages requiring clicks or logins.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Firecrawl
pt-BR.description: Scraping, busca, crawling e interação com páginas via Firecrawl CLI. Use sempre que o usuário quiser buscar na web, raspar páginas, obter conteúdo de URLs ou interagir com sites que exigem cliques ou login.
